title: Top Integrated BCA MCA Colleges in Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India
content: Students enrolling in this program can pursue Bachelor’s as well as Master of Computer Application without taking a break. Through this program students will not only get a world class, “industry-ready” curriculum but also end up saving a year. With the fast growing demand for computer skills and applications, the popularity of computers in education has also increased rapidly over the past few years. Students are more attracted to take up computers as their specialized field of study or pursue their educational careers in Computer Applications. Some years down the line India will need more “techies” to meet the global demand of ever increasing IT revolution. This programme aims to meet the growing demand for qualified professionals in the field of Information Technology. This programme is inclined more towards Application Development and thus has more emphasis on the latest programming languages and tools to develop better and faster applications. It also a focuses on providing a sound theoretical background as well as good practical exposure to students in the relevant areas. Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list (for students having no Mathematics background compulsory bridge course will be framed by the University) For Migration from Other Universities: 1) Integrated BCA+MCA Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) Minimum 50% marks aggregate at XII level (Including English & Maths / Computer Science / Informatics Practice / Computer Applications / Multimedia & Web) 01 02 Analyze and synthesis computing systems through quantitative and qualitative techniques. 03 04 05 06 To Develop practical skills to provide solutions to industry, society and business. 07 Understand environmental issues and lead a life with concerns for environment. 08 09 10 Communicate effectively in both verbal and written form. 11 12 01 02 03 Undertake higher education at institutions of transnational reputation. 01 02 Students with a CUET / SAT (DI Code - 71057 ) score will be given preference in the merit list (for students having no Mathematics background compulsory bridge course will be framed by the University) For Migration from Other Universities: 1) Integrated BCA+MCA Ist yr. minimum 50% marks or 5.0 CGPA on a 10 point scale 2) Minimum 50% marks aggregate at XII level (Including English & Maths / Computer Science / Informatics Practice / Computer Applications / Multimedia & Web)
